# Material Design Icons (MDI / Pictogrammers)

- Upstream: https://github.com/Templarian/MaterialDesign
- Site: https://pictogrammers.com/library/mdi/
- License: Pictogrammers Free License (Apache-2.0-compatible, MIT-compatible, used by SIL OFL projects) (see `LICENSE`)
- Acquired: 2026-04-21 via `git clone --depth 1`
- Layout: flat `icons/` directory

## Count

- Total icons: **7447**
- Size on disk: ~29 MB

## Sample filenames

```
ab-testing.svg
abacus.svg
abjad-arabic.svg
abugida-devanagari.svg
access-point.svg
access-point-network.svg
access-point-network-off.svg
account.svg
account-alert.svg
account-alert-outline.svg
account-arrow-down.svg
account-arrow-down-outline.svg
account-arrow-left.svg
account-box.svg
account-box-outline.svg
account-cash.svg
account-check.svg
account-child.svg
account-circle.svg
account-circle-outline.svg
```

## Notes

- Largest set in the reference pool by raw count; unified 24x24 grid, 2px stroke.
- Naming convention: base name is the filled style, `-outline` suffix is the outlined style (inverted from Bootstrap and Material Symbols where base = outlined).
- Very wide domain coverage: accounting, dev, gaming, musical, scientific, transport.
- License is Pictogrammers Free — free for commercial and non-commercial use with attribution; not strict MIT but functionally equivalent for this reference workspace.
